expectations.evidence: Identifies that withFloodWait already exists but the pagination loop needs its own adaptive backoff layer. Adds extractFloodWaitSeconds at pagination level.
Keeps existing sleep(config.apiDelayMs) and makes it adaptive: doubles on FLOOD_WAIT, relaxes by 0.8x on success.
Extracts actual wait duration: 'await sleep(waitSec * 1000 + jitter)' using extractFloodWaitSeconds. Explicitly cites skill rule: 'Always respect the wait duration.'
Primary fix is adaptive backoff at pagination level, not reducing scan frequency. Does not suggest lowering WORKER_INTERVAL_MINUTES.
